brief_summary: Three-band price chart for the H2 'The price tier HMX defended'. Y-axis is per-switch price ($0 to $1+). Dashed faded band at the bottom ($0–$0.25) labelled 'utility — Akko CS · Outemu V3'. Bronze-emphasized solid band in the middle ($0.45–$0.55) labelled 'HMX — Cloud · Hyacinth · Macchiato' with a side note 'absorbs into $130 BOM'. Dashed faded band at the top ($1.00+) labelled 'enthusiast — Tecsee · Geon · small-batch'. Connecting hatches between tiers reinforce the deliberate choice not to chase the slots above or below.
data_sources: hmx-cloud-deep-dive.mdx § 'The price tier HMX defended' — 'Cloud at $0.45 on CannonKeys at the time of writing, Hyacinth at $0.50, Macchiato at $0.55. The brand has not chased the $0.20 utility-tier slot ... nor ... the $1.00+ enthusiast tier ... Every public price across the catalog sits inside a 25-cent band.'
